questions.question: What is the primary goal of project planning in software development?
options: A) To manage changes in the project scope
B) To ensure timely and within-budget delivery
D) To reduce software development costs
questions.explanation: Project planning aims to ensure that the project is delivered on time, within budget, and meets the required quality standards.

questions.question: Which of the following is a key aspect of quality management in software development?
questions.explanation: Quality management in software development involves all aspects of the software development process, including testing and debugging, requirements gathering and analysis, and design and implementation.

questions.question: What is the benefit of using a quality management framework in software development?
questions.explanation: Using a quality management framework can improve software quality, reduce software development costs, and enhance project delivery time.

questions.question: Which technique is used to identify and prioritize software quality attributes?
questions.explanation: Pareto Analysis is a technique used to identify and prioritize software quality attributes based on their impact and frequency of occurrence.

questions.question: What is the role of project planning in ensuring software quality?
options: A) To identify and mitigate quality risks
B) To develop a quality management plan
C) To ensure that the project meets the required quality standards
questions.explanation: Project planning plays a crucial role in ensuring software quality by identifying and mitigating quality risks, developing a quality management plan, and ensuring that the project meets the required quality standards.
